creator: barner@FreeBSD.org
text:
> I was just about to try that when your email came. :) If I use a 
> different user account using MWM as the window manager, firefox works. 
> Using that same user but running firefox from a KDE session, firefox 
> will crash! Switching back to MWM fixes it again. Seems to be a 
> KDE/firefox thing.

I'd just like to add a quick "Me too", i.e. I also use firefox 2.0 on KDE,
and I experience the same crashes. I'll try to get some good backtraces
(I have debugging symbols in firefox, but I don't have them in several
libraries. Otherwise, I use standard CFLAGS).

-- 
Best regards / Viele Grüße,                             barner@FreeBSD.org
 Simon Barner                                                barner@gmx.de
